about.label: 04 / ABOUT
about.title: WHO I AM
about.text: I'm Orik, an AI developer with hands-on experience building products at the intersection of AI and the web. Bots, automation, web apps — from idea to working product. I work fast — AI cuts dev time 3–5×. Most projects ship in 1–2 weeks.
